title: Not Enough Weapons
description: Not Enough Weapons is a Minecraft Fabric mod that adds custom weapons to the game. The vanilla game clearly does not have enough.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae9cd5b6bc385150700028bdabb1a6ab3173d35d_0.webp)

A comprehensive Minecraft Fabric mod that expands the game's weapon arsenal with custom-crafted weapons, each featuring unique abilities and balanced gameplay mechanics.

## Features

### Custom Weapons 
- **Emerald Sword** - Mid-game weapon that must be in the game
- **Iron Short Sword** - Early-game weapon with fast attack speed and balanced damage
- **Steel Broadsword** - Heavy weapon with high damage and slower attack speed
- **Firebrand** - Fire-based weapon with special fire effects
- **Ice Dagger** - Fast weapon that applies slowness and weakness effects
- **Water Wand** - Magical weapon with healing abilities and water-based effects
- **Dragonborn Blade** - End-game weapon with massive durability and dragon effects
- And way more will be added!

All Crafts are in the **Gallery**

### Gameplay Mechanics
- **Check the stats**: Simply press K (default keybind) while holding your custom weapon to view all the information about it
- **Unique Abilities**: Each weapon has special effects like status effects, healing, and elemental damage
- **Balanced Progression**: Weapons range from early-game to end-game with appropriate power scaling
- **Crafting Recipes**: All weapons have custom crafting recipes using vanilla and _mod_(in the future) materials
- **Cooldown System**: Special abilities have cooldown mechanics to maintain balance!
- **Admin Commands**: `/resetcooldowns` command for server administrators to reset weapon cooldowns

### Technical Features
- **Fabric 1.21.6+ Compatible**: Works with Minecraft 1.21.6 and above
- **Client & Server Support**: Full multiplayer compatibility
- **Custom Tool Materials**: Each weapon uses balanced custom tool materials
- **Status Effects**: Weapons apply various status effects to targets
- **Sound Effects**: Custom sound effects for weapon abilities
- **Creative Tab Integration**: All weapons appear in the Combat creative tab

## Installation
1. Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.21.6+
2. Install Fabric API
3. Place the mod JAR file in your mods folder
4. Launch Minecraft

## Compatibility
- **Minecraft Version**: 1.21.6+
- **Fabric Loader**: 0.17.2+
- **Java Version**: 21+
- **Fabric API**: Required

This mod enhances the combat experience by providing players with diverse weapon choices, each offering unique tactical advantages and satisfying progression through the game's content.
